extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint finish after MOVISTAR forced echelons at 100km to go using crosswinds near windmills, though no GC splits materialized.
tactical_patterns: MOVISTAR attacked at 100km out in crosswinds near windmills, creating peloton splits at 50+mph speeds despite no GC consequences.
PHILIPSEN Jasper jumped early in final corner forcing BENNETT Sam's late 25-meter acceleration, revealing timing vulnerability for future sprints.
ACKERMANN Pascal finishing fourth suggests BORA's leadout failed on high-speed finishes compared to Deceuninck's MØRKØV-led train dominance.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: demonstrated superior top-end speed in final 25 meters after doubting he could close PHILIPSEN's corner attack gap
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: strong enough to force panic from BENNETT but mistimed final corner attack by jumping too early
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: distant fourth place suggests speed disadvantage on fast finishes, team seeking revenge opportunities in week two
rider_signals.MOSCHETTO Matteo: positive: third place shows CCC can deliver sprint results without designated leadout train on downhill finishes
